sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str1 String, str2 String);
SELECT id, byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) > 0;
SELECT id, byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) / length(str1) AS normalized_distance FROM test_strings WHERE str1 != '';
SELECT id, byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings ORDER BY distance ASC;
CREATE TABLE numbers (num1 UInt32, num2 UInt32);
SELECT num1, num2, byteHammingDistance(toString(num1), toString(num2)) AS hamming_dist FROM numbers WHERE num1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) + byteHammingDistance(str1, '') / NULLIF(length(str1), 0)) AS complex_case FROM test_strings;
SELECT AVG(byteHammingDistance(str1, str2)) / COUNT(*) as avg_distance FROM test_strings GROUP BY str1 HAVING avg_distance > 0;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (id UInt32, bin_data String, value Float32);
SELECT id, byteHammingDistance(bin_data, '1000000') / NULLIF(value, 0) AS scaled_distance FROM mixed_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, byteHammingDistance(NULL, bin_data) AS null_case FROM mixed_data WHERE bin_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT str1, str2, byteHammingDistance(str1, str2) / MAX(byteHammingDistance(str1, str2)) OVER() as relative_hamming_distance FROM test_strings;
